scripts.build: tsc -b src/functions/* && cp package.json dist/process_sqs_event/ && cd dist/process_sqs_event && npm install --production
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run sam:build && npm run sam:start
scripts.zip: mkdir -p zips && for d in dist/*; do name=$(basename $d); cd $d && zip -r ../../../zips/$name.zip . && cd -; done
scripts.build:zip: npm run build && npm run zip
